source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/06_인허가 조사 및 보고자료/(완) 230804 - X-ray system(Floor Mounted DR) 제조시 필요인증/방사선안전규제_민원안내집(20201210).pdf

document.title: 방사선안전규제 민원안내집
document.documentType: regulatory civil petition guide / application procedure guide
document.revisionOrVersion: form examples include revised 2018-05-03 for 별지 제26호

sourceSummary.oneLine: Chunk covers Korean radiation-safety civil petition procedures for approved transport containers and miscellaneous RI/RG, radiation generator, radioactive waste, business status, reissue, English certificate, temporary use site, and radiography workplace filings.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as a wiki source for Korean NSSC/KINS submission timing, forms, required documents, processing flow, responsible authorities, and legal bases for radiation-safety applications and notifications.
keyPoints: Transport container procedures include design change approval, manufacturing inspection, use inspection, and exemption from manufacturing/use inspection.
Most applications may be filed through RASIS electronic civil petition, by mail, or in person, with KINS receiving/reviewing and NSSC issuing approvals or acceptances where applicable.

Minor-change, transfer/acquisition, business start/suspension/resumption/closure, self-disposal plan, certificate reissue, English certificate issuance, temporary use-site change, and radiography workplace opening/closure procedures are listed with forms and legal bases.

entities.name: 원자력안전위원회
entities.evidence: Procedures identify 원자력안전위원회 as issuing approvals, receiving certain notifications, and legal fee authority.

entities.name: 한국원자력안전기술원
entities.evidence: Workflow sections repeatedly state 서류접수 and review by 한국원자력안전기술원, with mail address in Daejeon.

entities.name: RASIS
entities.evidence: Application methods list 전자민원 https://rasis.kins.re.kr and 민원절차 > 민원서식 download paths.

entities.name: KOREA INSTITUTE OF NUCLEAR SAFETY
entities.evidence: Section divider includes KOREA INSTITUTE OF NUCLEAR SAFETY.

entities.name: 원자력안전법
entities.evidence: Multiple procedures cite Nuclear Safety Act articles including 제76조, 제77조, 제94조, 제95조.

concepts.name: 운반용기 설계변경승인
concepts.evidence: A civil petition to change approved transport-container design uses 시행규칙 별지 제90호 and must be submitted before design change.

concepts.name: 운반용기 제작검사
concepts.evidence: Manufacturing inspection verifies whether an approved transport container was manufactured according to the approved design.

concepts.name: 운반용기 사용검사
concepts.evidence: Use inspection is required to continue using an approved transport container and is submitted before each five-year interval after manufacturing inspection pass.

concepts.name: 운반용기 제작검사 또는 사용검사 면제
concepts.evidence: Foreign-made transport containers may apply for exemption from manufacturing or use inspection with foreign regulator certificates or equivalent inspection records.

concepts.name: 경미한 사항의 변경신고
concepts.evidence: Minor changes for RI/RG users, radiation-generator design approval, and transport-container design approval are reported on 별지 제4호.

concepts.name: 방사성물질등 또는 방사선발생장치 양도·양수 신고
concepts.evidence: Transfer/acquisition of radioactive material or radiation-generating devices uses 별지 제105호 and is reported within 30 days.

concepts.name: 원자력관계사업 개시·중단·재개·폐지 신고
concepts.evidence: Business start, suspension, resumption, and closure use 별지 제26호, with closure also involving 별지 제106호 for cancellation/discontinuance.

concepts.name: 방사성폐기물 자체처분계획서
concepts.evidence: Self-disposal plan for radioactive waste below permitted criteria uses 별지 제84호 and must be filed before self-disposal.

concepts.name: 원자력관계허가증 등 재발급
concepts.evidence: Reissue applies when permits, registrations, or notification confirmations are damaged or lost, using 별지 제115호.

concepts.name: RI/RG 일시적 사용장소 변경신고
concepts.evidence: Temporary use outside an approved/reported location uses 별지 제59호 and is filed before mobile use begins.

concepts.name: 방사선투과검사 목적 작업장 개설·변경·폐지
concepts.evidence: Radiography workplace opening/change uses 별지 제59호의2, and workplace closure uses 별지 제59호의3.

evidence.claim: Transport container design change approval must be applied for before changing the approved design.
evidence.evidenceText: 운반용기 설계변경승인 신청: approved transport-container design changes; 제출시기: 운반용기의 설계변경을 하기 전; form 별지 제90호.

evidence.claim: Transport container manufacturing inspection requires Form No. 92 and supporting quality/manufacturing/test facility documentation.
evidence.evidenceText: 운반용기 제작검사 신청 uses 별지 제92호; required documents include 품질보증계획서, 제작방법 설명서, 제작설비 명세서, 시험·검사방법 설명서, 시험·검사시설 또는 검사기기 명세서.

evidence.claim: Manufacturing inspection for transport containers is legally based on Nuclear Safety Act Article 77(1), Enforcement Decree Article 113(1), and Enforcement Regulation Article 108(1).
evidence.evidenceText: 관련 규정: 원자력안전법 제77조제1항, 시행령 제113조제1항, 시행규칙 제108조제1항.

evidence.claim: Transport container use inspection applies to BU-type, MB-type, C-type, and fissile-material transport containers and is due before each five-year period after manufacturing-inspection acceptance.
evidence.evidenceText: 사용검사 대상: BU형 또는 MB형 운반용기, C형 운반용기, 핵분열성물질 운반용기; 제출시기: 제작검사에 합격한 시점으로부터 매 5년이 경과하기 전.

evidence.claim: Transport container use inspection requires Form No. 93, maintenance specification if repaired, and self-inspection report/procedure when seeking document review.
evidence.evidenceText: 구비서류: 운반용기 사용검사신청서 제93호서식; 보수명세서 1부; 자체점검보고서 및 점검절차서 1부 when written review is sought.

evidence.claim: Foreign-made transport containers may seek manufacturing- or use-inspection exemption by submitting foreign regulator certificates or equivalent reports.
evidence.evidenceText: 면제 신청: foreign-made 운반용기; manufacturing exemption documents include foreign regulator manufacturing inspection pass certificate or manufacturing/inspection report; use exemption documents include foreign regulator use inspection pass certificate or use inspection report.

evidence.claim: Minor changes must be reported within 30 days after change, except RI/RG additions or changes by permitted users must be reported before change.
evidence.evidenceText: 경미한 사항의 변경신고 제출시기: 변경 후 30일 이내; 단, 허가사용자가 신고상 RI 또는 RG를 추가하거나 변경하고자 하는 경우 변경 전에 신고.

evidence.claim: Minor-change reports use Enforcement Regulation Form No. 4 and are processed under Nuclear Safety Act Articles 53, 60, and 76 and related regulations.
evidence.evidenceText: 신청서식: 별지 제4호 경미한 사항의 변경신고서; 관련 규정 include 원자력안전법 제53조제1항 단서, 제60조제1항 단서, 제76조제1항 단서.

evidence.claim: Transfer/acquisition of radioactive materials or radiation-generating devices must be reported within 30 days from transfer/acquisition date.
evidence.evidenceText: 양도·양수신고: 방사성동위원소 또는 방사선발생장치를 타 기관에 양도하거나 양수한 경우; 제출시기: 양도·양수일로부터 30일 이내.

evidence.claim: Business start notifications must be filed within 30 days from start date and use Enforcement Regulation Form No. 26.
evidence.evidenceText: 사업 개시신고: 허가사용자·신고사용자 및 업무행자가 사업을 최초로 개시하는 경우; 제출시기: 개시한 날부터 30일 이내; 별지 제26호.

evidence.claim: Business suspension, resumption, and closure notifications use Form No. 26 and have a stated legal processing period of 24 months, though the guide notes same-day acceptance is typical for start/suspension/resumption absent special circumstances.
evidence.evidenceText: 개시/중단/재개 sections show 처리기간 24개월 and notes that except special circumstances the 신고 is accepted same day; closure section shows 폐지신고 processing 24개월.

evidence.claim: Business closure notification requires reporting within 30 days, and post-closure measures for possessed radioactive materials must also be reported within 30 days after measures are taken.
evidence.evidenceText: 폐지신고: 사업 폐지 within 30 days on 별지 제26호; after disposal/transfer or other radiation hazard prevention measures, report within 30 days on 별지 제106호.

evidence.claim: Radioactive waste self-disposal plan applies to waste below NSSC permitted criteria and must be applied for before self-disposal.
evidence.evidenceText: 자체처분계획서 대상: 핵종별 농도가 원자력안전위원회가 정하는 값 미만의 방사성폐기물; 제출시기: 자체처분하기 전에 신청.

evidence.claim: Certificate reissue is available when permits, registration certificates, or notification confirmations are damaged or lost and uses Enforcement Regulation Form No. 115.
evidence.evidenceText: 원자력관계허가증 등 재발급 신청: 허가증·등록증 또는 신고확인증을 훼손 또는 분실한 경우; 별지 제115호; 처리기간 15일.

evidence.claim: English permit/certificate issuance can be requested for permits, registrations, or notification confirmations, with no listed legal basis or fee.
evidence.evidenceText: 영문 허가증등 발급 신청: 허가증·등록증 또는 신고확인증을 영문으로 발급; 담당부서심 없음; 처리기간 해당 없음; 관련 규정 해당 없음.

evidence.claim: Temporary RI/RG use site change must be filed by five days before mobile use begins and uses Enforcement Regulation Form No. 59.
evidence.evidenceText: RI/RG 일시적사용장소 변경신고: 제출시기 방사성동위원소 또는 방사선발생장치의 이동사용 개시 5일전까지; 별지 제59호.

evidence.claim: Radiography workplace opening/change must be filed 30 days before mobile use begins, or five days before when the work period is under one month or urgent.
evidence.evidenceText: 방사선투과검사 목적 작업장 개설/변경신고 제출시기: 이동사용의 개시 30일전까지; 작업기간이 1개월 미만이거나 긴급한 경우 5일 전.

evidence.claim: Radiography workplace closure must be reported within 10 days after operation ends and requires client confirmation of workplace closure including workers and work.
evidence.evidenceText: 작업장 폐지신고 제출시기: 개설된 작업장의 운영 종료 10일 이내; 구비서류 includes 작업인원 및 작업을 포함한 발주자의 작업장 폐지확인서.

reviewFlags.reason: The chunk contains significant OCR/mojibake artifacts; claims were limited to readable Korean text and repeated form/procedure headings.
Some displayed processing periods appear as months where days may have been intended by the source OCR; evidence avoids correcting OCR unless clearly supported.
